goal: Add a side-effect-free execution preflight builder that validates release-governance approved-action consume application authority is ready for later execution while keeping action consume, merge, external actions, GitHub, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not consume actions, merge, create PRs, call GitHub, perform external actions, call providers, call DB, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Ready release-governance approved-action consume application authority can be preflighted for later execution without executing it.
Execution preflight ref, executor ref, and execution policy ref are required.
Action consume, merge, and external actions remain false.
assumptions: Actual action consumption, PR work, and merge require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing execution ref, and blocked authority cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Action consumption, merge, PR creation, GitHub calls, external actions, DB, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-130 recorded side-effect-free release-governance approved-action consume application authority without consuming the action or merging.
